title: NY and EU Regulators Agree to Collaborate on Stablecoin Supervision
message_html: NY and EU Regulators Agree to Collaborate on Stablecoin Supervision ...
snippet: New York state’s financial watchdog has formed a stablecoin-related partnership with the European Banking Authority. The New York State Department of Financial Services (DFS) announced on Tuesday (June 2) that it has signed a memorandum of understanding (MOU) with the authority to allow for “the exc

title: Insurance giant WTW moves into crypto asset recovery with Redefind buy
message_html: Insurance giant WTW moves into crypto asset recovery with Redefind buy ...
snippet: The global insurance broker acquired crypto insurance platform Redefind and launched a digital asset protection service covering asset tracing and legal recovery costs.
